name: Dark Dagger
description: This short blade weapon forged using dark metals has limited range but comes out fast.

components.description: This short blade weapon forged using dark metals has limited range but comes out fast.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.changes: The Rakta Dark Dagger Shield bonus when damaging an enemy afflicted by Radiation is now only granted if you have Shields.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script crash that could occur when dealing damage with Rakta Dark Dagger.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes: In the above example, sword and shield weapons (such as the Silva & Aegis) have a blocking angle of 70 degrees, centered on the front of the player, where as a dagger weapon (such as the Dark Dagger) will only have a blocking angle of 45 degrees. (Previously all weapons had a locked blocking angle of 45 degrees upon the introduction of Auto Blocking.)

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.2
patchlogs.changes: The Rakta Dark Dagger’s innate upgrade on equip is now called Mind Haze.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Rakta Dark Dagger’s equipped bonus is now an innate upgrade that triggers on equip and lasts for 30 secs (refreshed on Melee equip).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Dark Daggers not being visible in the Codex.

patchlogs.name: Recurring Nightmares
patchlogs.changes: Gleaming Blight can now be equipped on the Rakta Dark Dagger.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.changes: Increased the Shield steal amount of the Rakta Dark Dagger in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.changes: The Ceramic Dagger, Dark Dagger, Heat Dagger, Karyst and Sheev can now be used in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Dark Dagger: Gleaming Blight: adds 25% status chance
